name: Glossary Entry
description: Defines a term used in the project domain. Helps establish a shared vocabulary across the team.

term.name: Term
term.hint: The term to define, e.g. Invoice, Session, Tenant

definition.name: Definition
definition.hint: What does this term mean in this project's context?

default.name: Glossary entry
default.description: A term and its definition for the project glossary.
default.example: Invoice: A document issued to a customer summarising goods or services provided and the amount owed.
